_disclaimer: Illustrative example categories only. Real card names, reward rates, and offers change frequently and vary by issuer/country — this file is a placeholder structure for the Rewards Agent, meant to be replaced with a live card-comparison data source or the user's own curated list before any of this is treated as real financial guidance.

categories.typical_benefit: Airline miles or points per unit spent on flight bookings, often 2-5x on travel category spend
categories.notes: Look for cards with no foreign transaction fees for international trips

categories.typical_benefit: Elite night credits and bonus points per stay, sometimes a free night after a spend threshold
categories.notes: Booking direct with the hotel chain (not a 3rd-party OTA) usually preserves loyalty benefits

categories.instrument: Cashback/rewards card with dining category bonus (example)
categories.notes: Some cards cap bonus-category spend per quarter/year

categories.typical_benefit: Complimentary domestic/international lounge visits per year via Priority Pass or issuer network
categories.notes: Visit caps and guest policies vary by card tier

categories.typical_benefit: Avoids the typical 2-3.5% foreign transaction fee most standard cards charge
categories.notes: Useful for the whole trip, not just one category

categories.typical_benefit: 1-2% flat cashback with no category restrictions
categories.notes: A reasonable default for spend that doesn't fit a bonus category
